name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect have Malediction
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 8% increased Damage
Recover 2% of Life when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

name: Vixen's Entrapment
explicitMods: Trigger Socketed Curse Spell when you Cast a Curse Spell, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
0.2% of Spell Damage Leeched as Energy Shield for each Curse on Enemy
You can apply an additional Curse
Curse Skills have 20% increased Cast Speed
flavourText: "One coy look. One blown kiss. One word spoken.
One night I wish I'd forget."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. 8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
